positive: A highly detailed, elegant silhouette of a stylized cosmic nebula intertwining with deep-sea bioluminescent flora. The composition should feature a central, recognizable pattern of spiraling cosmic dust clouds giving way to intricate, glowing kelp and jellyfish forms. Use deep indigo and royal violet as the primary background colors, accented with vibrant pops of neon cyan, electric magenta, and gold foil highlights. The style should be minimalist yet maximally complex, optimized for screen printing or vinyl decal transfer. Strong contrast is key, ensuring the luminous elements pop dramatically against the dark void. Central symmetry, clean lines, isolated on a solid background for optimal apparel placement.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, grain, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, ugly, cartoon, photorealism, logos, trademarks
